name: Agenta
tagline: Open-source LLMOps platform for prompt management, evaluation, and observability
metaDescription: Agenta is an open-source LLMOps platform that combines prompt management, evaluation, and OpenTelemetry-native LLM tracing to ship reliable LLM apps.
overview: Agenta is an open-source LLMOps platform for building production-grade LLM applications. It brings prompt management, evaluation, and observability into one place so teams can iterate on prompts and watch how their apps behave in production.

It is aimed at engineering and product teams, and is built so that subject matter experts can collaborate on prompt engineering through a UI while engineers work via API. You can run it on Agenta Cloud (free tier, no credit card) or self-host the whole stack with Docker Compose.

In the LLM observability space, Agenta's tracing is OpenTelemetry-native and compatible with OpenLLMetry and OpenInference, so traces of cost, latency, and usage tie back to the specific prompts and configurations that produced them.
features: Prompt management with an interactive playground to compare prompts side by side against test cases
Version control for prompts and configurations, including branching and environments
LLM evaluation with 20+ pre-built evaluators, LLM-as-judge, custom evaluators, and human feedback
OpenTelemetry-native tracing compatible with OpenLLMetry and OpenInference
Cost, latency, and usage monitoring for apps in production
Support for 50+ LLM models, plus the option to bring your own provider

gettingStarted.intro: The quickest path is Agenta Cloud (free tier, no credit card), but you can also self-host the full platform with Docker Compose.

steps.heading: Clone the repository
steps.body: Pull the source and move into the project directory.

steps.heading: Create the environment file
steps.body: Copy the example config before starting the services.

steps.heading: Start the services
steps.body: Bring up the stack with Docker Compose using the web and traefik profiles.
steps.code: docker compose -f hosting/docker-compose/oss/docker-compose.gh.yml --env-file hosting/docker-compose/oss/.env.oss.gh --profile with-web --profile with-traefik up -d

steps.heading: Open the app
steps.body: Once the services are running, access Agenta at http://localhost. For remote hosts or custom ports, see the self-hosting docs.

useCases: Comparing prompt variants side by side in a playground before shipping changes
Versioning prompts and configurations across environments so production stays stable
Systematically evaluating LLM outputs with pre-built, custom, or LLM-as-judge evaluators
Tracing LLM apps in production to debug workflows and track cost and latency
